title: Blue Dart is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Blue Dart is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Blue Dart invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Ludhiana location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Blue Dart:
Blue Dart is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Dart!
